title: BEM-772 direct Claude dispatch
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:24 (UTC+3)'
# Script used in GitHub Actions only. It uses gh cli with PAT secret; it does not expose secrets.
dispatch=Path('scripts/dispatch_claude_internal_auditor.sh')
dispatch.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\nif [ -z "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then\n  echo "GH_TOKEN missing"\n  exit 1\nfi\ngh workflow run claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml --ref main\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-dispatch-bridge.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Dispatch Bridge\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    paths:\n      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/**'\n      - 'scripts/dispatch_claude_internal_auditor.sh'\n      - '.github/workflows/claude-dispatch-bridge.yml'\n\npermissions:\n  contents: read\n  actions: write\n\nconcurrency:\n  group: claude-dispatch-bridge\n  cancel-in-progress: false\n\njobs:\n  dispatch-claude:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v4\n      - name: Dispatch Claude internal auditor workflow\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: bash scripts/dispatch_claude_internal_auditor.sh\n''')
# Kick artifact: update latest GPT-to-Claude mailbox so push should trigger bridge.
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem772_direct_dispatch_channel_trigger.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-772 | DIRECT DISPATCH CHANNEL TRIGGER'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude, direct dispatch bridge is installed. Please answer latest architecture strategy question and explain prior missing response.'+sep+sep+'Required response file: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem772_claude_response.md'+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem772_verify_direct_dispatch_result.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-772 Next | Verify Direct Dispatch Result'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: verify Claude dispatcher runtime state and mailbox response after direct dispatch bridge.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-772 DIRECT DISPATCH CHANNEL INSTALLED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next: verify direct dispatch bridge started Claude dispatcher and produced runtime state/response.'+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
checks=[
 {'name':'dispatch_script_exists','pass':dispatch.exists(),'evidence':str(dispatch)},
 {'name':'bridge_workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'uses_pat_secret','pass':'AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'has_actions_write','pass':'actions: write' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'trigger_mail_written','pass':mail.exists(),'evidence':str(mail)}]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='direct_claude_dispatch_channel_installed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'DIRECT_CLAUDE_DISPATCH_INSTALL_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'install_direct_claude_dispatch_channel.v1','bem':'BEM-772','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem772_install_direct_claude_dispatch_channel.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem772_install_direct_claude_dispatch_channel.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-772 | Install Direct Claude Dispatch Channel | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Direct dispatch bridge installed using PAT secret in GitHub Actions.\nBlocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem772_install_direct_claude_dispatch_channel','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem772_install_direct_claude_dispatch_channel.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-772 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(dispatch),str(wf),str(mail),str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Installed direct Claude dispatch bridge via GitHub Actions PAT and wrote a new GPT-to-Claude trigger mail item')
"""
No issue comments.
